stories.title: 30 things we learned in the NBA this offseason, on...
stories.summary: There are lessons to be taken from every team's moves in the summer of 2026, big and small, and we break them all down.

stories.title: Kram grades offseason moves for every team: Who go...
stories.summary: Zach Kram hands out grades for all 30 teams after a busy offseason of trades and deals.

stories.title: Ravens waive rookie QB Pavia ahead of camp
stories.summary: The Ravens waived rookie quarterback Diego Pavia on Thursday to make room for veteran center Ethan Pocic, who officially signed his free agent contract.

stories.title: Trump welcomes Dodgers at WH for second visit
stories.summary: President Donald Trump feted Shohei Ohtani, Freddie Freeman and the World Series champion Los Angeles Dodgers at the White House on Thursday, calling the team "one of the great brands anywhere in the world" during a Rose Garden event.

stories.title: NCAA D-I Board: No plans to change age rule
stories.summary: The NCAA Division I Board doubled down Thursday on the new age-based eligibility rule that has prompted some athletes to go to court in hopes of extending their college careers.
